free_text: Investigation of properties of 6He nucleus in
interaction of alpha-particles with tritium nuclei
Solid TiT target thick (2.7 mg/cm2) saturated by
consisting of dE detector (120 um) and E-detector
(1-1.5 mm) located at 500 mm from target.
On. REFERENCE: Eng. and Rus. ref. swapped.
